ddls:
CREATE TABLE "meteorites" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each meteorite */,
  "indice" INTEGER /* Index of the meteorite in the database */,
  "mass" REAL /* Mass of the meteorite in grams */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the meteorite landed */,
  "lat" REAL /* Latitude of the meteorite landing site */,
  "lon" REAL /* Longitude of the meteorite landing site */,
  "fall" TEXT /* Whether the meteorite fell or was found */,
  "reclat" REAL /* Latitude of the meteorite recovery location */,
  "reclong" REAL /* Longitude of the meteorite recovery location */,
  "geolocation" TEXT /* Geolocation of the meteorite landing site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meteorite type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the meteorite type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compositions" (
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each composition */,
  "composition_name" TEXT /* Name of the meteorite composition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the meteorite composition */,
  "composition_type" TEXT /* Type of the meteorite composition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_types" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite type */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the meteorite type in the meteorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id", "type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_compositions" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "composition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite composition */,
  "percentage" REAL /* Percentage of the meteorite composition in the meteorite */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id", "composition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "researcher_name" TEXT /* Full name of the researcher */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the researcher is affiliated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "research_teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each research team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the research team */,
  "leader_id" INTEGER /* Leader of the research team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_research_teams_leader_id FOREIGN KEY ("leader_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_members" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the research team */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "authors" TEXT /* Authors of the publication */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal of the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publication_authors" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the researcher in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id", "researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "meteorite_publications" (
  "meteorite_id" INTEGER /* ID of the meteorite */,
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* ID of the publication */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the meteorite in the publication */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("meteorite_id", "publication_id")
)
column_names: Index of the meteorite in the database
Mass of the meteorite in grams
Latitude of the meteorite landing site
Longitude of the meteorite landing site
Whether the meteorite fell or was found
Latitude of the meteorite recovery location
Longitude of the meteorite recovery location
Geolocation of the meteorite landing site
Percentage of the meteorite type in the meteorite
Percentage of the meteorite composition in the meteorite
Institution the researcher is affiliated with
Unique identifier for each research team
Role of the researcher in the team
Role of the researcher in the publication
Role of the meteorite in the publication
